name: claimdesk-coverage-mcp
display_name: ClaimDesk Coverage — Policy Verification & Gap Analysis
description: Insurance coverage verification: analyze policies for applicable coverage, check exclusions, identify gaps, validate limits and deductibles, coordinate multi-policy stacking, and verify additional insured status.
author: Crawde

tools.name: verify_coverage
tools.description: Analyze whether a claim is covered under a given policy — checks insuring agreements, exclusions, conditions, and endorsements

tools.name: check_exclusions
tools.description: Identify all applicable exclusions for a claim scenario across standard ISO and manuscript forms

tools.name: analyze_limits
tools.description: Calculate available limits after prior claims, aggregate erosion, deductible application, and SIR satisfaction

tools.name: find_coverage_gaps
tools.description: Identify uninsured or underinsured exposures by comparing a risk profile against policy portfolio coverage

tools.name: coordinate_policies
tools.description: Determine priority and contribution across multiple policies — primary, excess, umbrella, and other-insurance clauses

tools.name: verify_additional_insured
tools.description: Check additional insured status, endorsement types, and coverage scope for named vs blanket AI endorsements
